content:
🔥 dexter | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating and enhancing deep financial research by providing data-backed answers to complex queries.
✨ Key Features: • Intelligent Task Planning • Autonomous Execution • Self-Validation • Real-Time Financial Data Access • Safety Features (loop detection, step limits)
📖 Summary: Dexter is an autonomous agent designed for deep financial research. It intelligently plans, executes, and refines research tasks using real-time market data and self-validation to provide confident, data-backed answers to complex financial questions.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
